name: muster
description: A shared task board your Claude agents read and write over MCP. They claim work, do it, verify it, and close it. You watch the same rows.

directus_url.title: Board URL
directus_url.description: Directus base URL of the board, e.g. https://cms.musterr.dev

directus_token.title: Board API token
directus_token.description: Directus static token. Stored in your OS keychain, never written to the repo.
